pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.2.3 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; upgrading is required to compile and run on the target JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the new JDK target.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin uses this property; without it, the project compiles for Java 8, causing incompatibility with Java 21 features or runtime expectations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JitPack repository to resolve the new FIFO SDK dependency.
Add FIFO_SDK_LiveObjects dependency for new SDK functionality.
Upgrade Azure IoT Service Client to version 2.1.7.
Remove Spring Integration MQTT dependency as it is no longer used.
Remove Guava dependency as it is no longer used.
Remove Azure Event Hubs dependency as it is no longer used.
Upgrade Azure IoT Device Client to version 2.4.1.
Upgrade Application Insights Spring Boot Starter to version 2.6.4.
Upgrade Azure Spring Boot Metrics Starter to version 2.3.5.
Add Spring Integration JMX dependency for monitoring support.
Add Maven Model dependency for build-time model manipulation.
Add Apache Commons Text dependency for string processing utilities.
Add Jodah Failsafe dependency for retry and circuit breaker logic.
Add ArchUnit dependencies for architecture testing.
Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 dependency for architecture testing integration.
Replace Spring Boot Maven Plugin with Maven Release Plugin for release management.
Remove Azure Web App Maven Plugin as deployment strategy changed.
Add SCM configuration for release plugin integration.
Add release profile with assembly and appassembler plugins for packaging.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Replace deprecated `DeviceTwin` API with the newer `TwinClient` for querying device twins.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.why_exists: The `DeviceTwin` class and its query methods are removed or deprecated in the newer Azure IoT SDK version, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Replace deprecated `RegistryManager` API with the newer `RegistryClient` for device registry operations.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.why_exists: The `RegistryManager` class is removed or deprecated in the newer Azure IoT SDK version, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Update `Device` object instantiation to use the new constructor signature.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.why_exists: The `Device.createFromId` static factory method is removed in the newer SDK, requiring direct constructor usage.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Update `Twin` tag manipulation to use the new Map-based API.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.why_exists: The `DeviceTwinDevice` and `Pair` classes for setting tags are removed in the newer SDK, requiring direct manipulation of the Twin's tags map.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Remove Spring Framework annotations and dependencies as the class is no longer a Spring-managed bean.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.why_exists: The migration to a new SDK version likely involves a refactoring away from Spring Boot auto-configuration for these specific clients, or the class is now instantiated manually. Keeping Spring annotations would cause runtime errors if the Spring context is not configured for this class.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.after: public IoTDeviceProvider(TwinClient twinClient, RegistryClient registryClient, String tagPlatformKey, String tagPlatformValue) {

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Remove Guava dependency and replace with standard Java collections.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.why_exists: While not strictly a JDK breaking change, the removal of Guava is part of the modernization. However, since `Lists.newArrayList()` is replaced by `new ArrayList<>()`, this is a polishment unless Guava was removed from the project entirely. Given the context of 'J8 -> J21' and 'New FIFO_SDK', this is likely a cleanup.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.after:
import java.util.ArrayList;
List<IotDeviceId> list = new ArrayList<>();

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Update logger initialization to use `MethodHandles.lookup()` for better performance and correctness in newer Java versions.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.why_exists: Using `LoggerFactory.getLogger(Class)` is still valid, but `MethodHandles.lookup().lookupClass()` is the recommended modern pattern to avoid class loading issues and improve performance. This is a polishment.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Change exception handling strategy from swallowing exceptions to throwing custom runtime exceptions.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.why_exists: This is a behavioral change for better error visibility, not a compilation requirement.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Add new method `deviceExists` to check device presence without throwing exceptions.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.why_exists: New functionality added in the newer version.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Add new method `logRegistryClientStatistics` to log device counts.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.why_exists: New functionality added in the newer version.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Refactor `getDevices` to accept a boolean flag for tag-based querying.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.why_exists: API signature change to support flexible querying.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Replace Spring RestTemplate HTTP client with a new LoAdapter abstraction for sending commands.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.why_exists: The old code relied on Spring's RestTemplate and manual URL construction, which is replaced by a higher-level adapter pattern in the new architecture.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Introduce Jackson ObjectMapper dependency for deserializing command payloads.
Introduce Failsafe RetryPolicy dependency for resilient command sending.
Update send method to deserialize command JSON and use LoAdapter with retry logic.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.why_exists: The old implementation sent raw strings via HTTP POST; the new implementation requires structured CommandAddRequest objects and uses the new adapter interface.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Change return type of send method from void to IotHubMessageResult.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.why_exists: The caller likely expects a result code (COMPLETE/REJECT) to handle message acknowledgment status, which the old void method could not provide.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.before: public void send(String deviceId, String command)
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.after: public IotHubMessageResult send(String deviceId, String command)

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Add SLF4J logger using MethodHandles.lookup() for Java 9+ compatibility.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.why_exists: MethodHandles.lookup().lookupClass() is a standard pattern for obtaining the class name in Java 9+ modules, replacing the older Class.class literal or reflection approaches often used in Java 8.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Restructure configuration from single-tenant flat keys to a multi-tenant list structure supporting multiple Azure IoT Hubs per LiveObjects tenant.
src/main/resources/application.yml.before:
lo:
  api-key: YOUR_API_KEY
  device-url: https://liveobjects.orange-business.com/api/v1/deviceMgt/devices
  uri: ssl://liveobjects.orange-business.com:8883
  username: YOUR_USERNAME
src/main/resources/application.yml.after:
tenant-list:
  - 
    live-objects-properties:
      hostname: liveobjects.orange-business.com
      api-key: YOUR_API_KEY
      username: application

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Add Azure IoT Hub specific configuration properties for device registration, session management, and messaging within the new tenant structure.
src/main/resources/application.yml.before:
azure:
  iot-connection-string: YOUR_IOT_CONNECTION_STRING
  iot-host-name: YOUR_IOT_HOST_NAME
  synchronization-device-interval: 10000
src/main/resources/application.yml.after:
azure-iot-hub-list:
      -
        iot-connection-string: YOUR_IOT_CONNECTION_STRING
        iot-host-name: YOUR_IOT_HOST_NAME
        device-registration-thread-pool-size: 10
        device-registration-period: 200

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Update Application Insights configuration to use the modern Spring Boot Actuator property structure.
src/main/resources/application.yml.before:
application-insights:
    instrumentation-key: YOUR_INSTMENTATION_KEY
    channel:
      in-process:
        developer-mode: true

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Actuator management endpoints configuration for health and metrics export to Azure Monitor.
src/main/resources/application.yml.after:
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: "*"
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: ALWAYS
  health:
    defaults:
      enabled: false
  metrics:
    export:
      azuremonitor:
        enabled: true

src/main/resources/logback.xml.general_idea: Add license header and enable dynamic configuration scanning in logback.
src/main/resources/logback.xml.after:
<!--

  ~ LICENSE file in the root directory of this source tree.

<configuration scan="true" scanPeriod="15 minutes">

src/main/resources/logback.xml.general_idea: Add a second, more detailed date format pattern to the console appender encoder.
Add a rolling file appender for INFO level logs with daily rotation.
Add a rolling file appender for all log levels with daily rotation.
Add specific logger configuration for Eclipse Paho MQTT client.
Add specific logger configuration for Apache Qpid Proton.
Attach the new file appenders to the root logger.
